case_title: VALERIE CHEW ET AL VS. RUDY CHEW ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62366238)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
